geography.data_source: Census 2011 ward boundary shapefiles, Central Delhi district. Covers Connaught Place, Karol Bagh, Rajinder Nagar, Paharganj.

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Central Delhi district tables. Density = 350000 / 25.5 ≈ 13725. Mixed residential-commercial zone with lower resident population than surrounding areas.

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round MPCE distribution (Central Delhi district). Moderately right-skewed — mix of government employees, Connaught Place commercial workers, and Karol Bagh traders. Rajinder Nagar has a significant coaching centre economy.

commute_profile.data_source: DMRC Origin-Destination Survey 2022. Rajiv Chowk is Delhi Metro's busiest station (~450K daily footfall). Three metro lines converge here making it the highest metro-accessible zone.

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Composite scores. Higher exam sensitivity (0.72) due to Rajinder Nagar UPSC coaching belt. Moderate fare sensitivity reflecting mixed income profile. High political mobilisation (0.78) due to proximity to Parliament, Jantar Mantar protest site.

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IHDS-II social capital module. Workplace-dominant network reflects Connaught Place office workers. Moderate clustering (0.48) due to mixed residential-commercial character.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Connaught Place Inner Circle
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from NDMC footfall data and DMRC Rajiv Chowk exit surveys. CP is Delhi's premier commercial district.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Karol Bagh Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Karol Bagh is a major retail market for electronics, textiles, and wedding shopping.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Paharganj Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from tourism board data. Paharganj is a backpacker hub with high informal hospitality employment near New Delhi Railway Station.

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: AGENT_SPEC.md Government Zone template (lines 754-764). Sum = 1.00. Central Delhi mirrors New Delhi's government-dominated workforce but with more commercial activity. Coaching centre economy drives student share.

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from MCD councillor count, trader association registrations (Karol Bagh, CP), and accredited press list.
